content.description:
Builds and maintains in-memory inverse indexes over all items. Provides raw index accessors and a convenience `getRelated(itemId)` function that returns all forward and inverse relationships for an item.

## Indexes

| Index | Key | Source field |
|-------|-----|--------------|
| `typeIndex` | type ID | `item.type` |
| `tagIndex` | tag ID | `item.content.tags[]` |
| `parentIndex` | parent ID | `item.content.parent` |
| `extendsIndex` | base type ID | `item.extends` |
| `containerIndex` | child ID | `item.attachments[].id` |
| `linkIndex` | target ID | `item://` refs in string content |
| `forTypeIndex` | type ID | `item.content.for_type` |
| `preferredViewIndex` | view ID | `item.preferredView` |

## Usage

```js
const lib = await api.require('related-items-lib');
lib.getInstancesOf(api.IDS.VIEW);       // all view items
lib.getLinksTo(someItemId);             // items linking to it
const rel = await lib.getRelated(id);   // all relationships
```

## See Also

- [Architecture Overview](item://a0a0a0a0-d0c0-4000-8000-000000000003)
- [Core Concepts](item://a0a0a0a0-d0c0-4000-8000-000000000002)
